title: China-to-South Sudan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverter Projects
rows.target_requirement: No mature, product-specific South Sudan EMC approval route for solar PV inverters has been identified. In practice, donor-funded, utility, mini-grid, and commercial PV projects should expect IEC-based EMC evidence, especially IEC 62920 for PV power-conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series emission / immunity and harmonic current tests. Because South Sudan has very low electrification and many diesel/off-grid or weak-grid systems, EMC evidence should be paired with project-level assessment of harmonics, generator interaction, communications immunity, and installation earthing.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, harmonic, and voltage fluctuation test methods as applicable
Project-owner, donor-lender, EPC, or utility EMC specifications for South Sudan PV, mini-grid, and diesel-hybrid projects
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly packaged under GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and laboratory reports from CNAS-accredited facilities. Those reports may reference IEC 61000-family methods, but the test scope, voltage setup, acceptance criteria, and documentation format may not match IEC 62920 or the project owner's South Sudan requirements. China EMC documentation should therefore be mapped clause-by-clause rather than assumed equivalent.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
CNAS-accredited China laboratory EMC reports using domestic or IEC-derived test methods
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports do not automatically satisfy South Sudan project requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, note whether tests were performed at 220/380 V or 230/400 V, and ask the SSEC/project engineer whether harmonics or immunity tests must be repeated under the South Sudan configuration. Diesel-hybrid and weak-grid projects should include harmonic and generator-interaction review.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; typically required by donor, EPC, SSEC, mini-grid, or commercial procurement specifications even where national EMC enforcement capacity is limited
mandatory_status.cn: China-side EMC evidence supports domestic voluntary certification or procurement but is not an automatic South Sudan acceptance route

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the inverter model and map any China GB/T EMC reports carefully. Confirm test voltage, harmonic limits, weak-grid assumptions, and diesel-hybrid interaction with the South Sudan project engineer before shipment.

rows.requirement: SSEC Grid or Mini-Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230/400 V Settings
rows.target_requirement: South Sudan's PV-inverter market is still nascent and project-specific. Grid-connected or mini-grid projects should expect SSEC, the project engineer, donor lender, or EPC specification to request IEC grid-interface evidence, especially IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface performance. South Sudan uses a 50 Hz supply with nominal 230/400 V low-voltage service. This is the same frequency as China but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V nominal baseline, so inverter firmware, over/under-voltage thresholds, reconnection timing, and protection relay settings should be validated for 230/400 V operation. Extreme ambient heat and diesel-hybrid operation should also be considered in derating and commissioning tests.
target_standards: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
SSEC / project-specific grid-connection conditions for South Sudan public-grid, mini-grid, diesel-hybrid, or donor-funded PV projects
South Sudan low-voltage supply practice — 50 Hz, nominal 230/400 V
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are built around Chinese grid practice and factory settings, including 50 Hz 220/380 V nominal low-voltage assumptions. They are useful technical inputs but should not be presented as automatic substitutes for IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence or South Sudan project acceptance.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
rows.gap: Gap: South Sudan should be treated as a project-specific IEC market, not as a jurisdiction where China grid approvals transfer automatically. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, firmware setting sheets for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, and commissioning records for diesel-hybrid or weak-grid operation. Do not state that South Sudan voltage matches China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches; the nominal voltage differs.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and typically mandatory in practice where SSEC, a mini-grid operator, donor lender, EPC, or project owner requires grid-interface evidence; national product-specific enforcement is still developing
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator or voluntary certification expectations but does not automatically transfer to South Sudan project acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat South Sudan grid-connected PV inverter supply as project-specific IEC due diligence. Validate IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence, firmware settings for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, and heat / weak-grid derating before shipment. China GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 evidence is not automatically accepted.

rows.requirement: Electrical Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 and Heat-Derating Evidence
rows.target_requirement: South Sudan's national standards infrastructure, led by SSNBS, is still developing and no mature solar-inverter-specific mandatory certification route has been identified. For serious grid, mini-grid, donor-funded, or commercial PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety type-test evidence should be treated as the practical baseline. Given South Sudan's heat, dust, diesel/off-grid use cases, and limited maintenance capacity, the safety file should also include thermal derating curves, ingress-protection ratings, installation altitude/ambient assumptions, and clear operating instructions for high-temperature sites.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SSNBS standards-adoption and conformity expectations for imported electrical goods, where applicable
Project-owner or donor procurement specifications for South Sudan PV, mini-grid, and off-grid power systems
rows.china_equivalent: China-side safety documentation for PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, factory inspection records, and voluntary CQC/CGC-style certificates. These documents can help demonstrate design maturity, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports unless the report itself covers the IEC standard, model family, ratings, and environmental assumptions required by the South Sudan project.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
China voluntary PV inverter certification and factory inspection documentation
rows.gap: Gap: South Sudan's nascent standards capacity makes project-owner due diligence especially important. Exporters should not rely only on China GB/T safety certificates; provide IEC 62109-1/-2 reports from an accredited laboratory, model-family coverage statements, thermal derating evidence for extreme heat, and installation instructions suitable for off-grid, diesel-hybrid, or weak-grid sites. Confirm with SSNBS, SSEC, the importer, and the donor/EPC whether any local inspection or import conformity step applies.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly mandatory in procurement practice for donor, utility, mini-grid, and commercial projects; national solar-inverter-specific certification enforcement remains nascent
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 evidence may support China-side voluntary certification or procurement but does not automatically satisfy South Sudan safety due diligence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 safety reports, heat-derating evidence, and project-specific installation controls as the practical baseline for South Sudan PV inverter supply. China GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 documents are useful but not automatically accepted; verify any SSNBS, SSEC, importer, or donor/EPC requirement before shipment.

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization (ISO) / South Sudan National Bureau of Standards member listing
